analysis.rewritten_desc: Step into this charming family home offering space and privacy for up to 4 guests. Located in [City], it's ideally suited for families seeking a comfortable stay with free on-site parking. With 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, the layout ensures ample room for everyone to relax. Modern amenities include [insert if amenities exist]. While the nightly rate of £326.80 is 111% above the market median, the home's spacious design and strategic location make it a compelling choice for extended stays. Book confidently with 14 verified reviews (5.0 star rating). Note: Host Charlie is new to hosting but committed to delivering a top-tier experience. Open dates include 57 nights across the next 90 days – check availability for your preferred dates.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Start with a wide shot of the living area to showcase space and family-friendly layout, as the 'Family Home' title emphasizes communal living areas as the primary value proposition for multi-guest stays.
